x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist TSOM uses for impact analysis. Without maps, AI cannot determine affected services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("has_map",true);gr.query();var mapped=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr2.addQuery("active",true);gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:mapped>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:mapped+" services with maps of "+total+" total",finding:mapped<5?"Only "+mapped+" services have service maps. Now Assist TSOM uses maps for AI impact analysis -- incomplete maps limit assessment depth.":mapped+" services with maps -- Now Assist TSOM has service context for AI impact analysis."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable Service Mapping for key business services. Target your top 10 most critical applications.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc7
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist TSOM uses for impact analysis. Without maps, AI cannot determine affected services.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Business Service Mapping</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("has_map",true);gr.query();var mapped=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr2.addQuery("active",true);gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:mapped>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:mapped+" services with maps of "+total+" total",finding:mapped<5?"Only "+mapped+" services have service maps. Now Assist TSOM uses maps for AI impact analysis -- incomplete maps limit assessment depth.":mapped+" services with maps -- Now Assist TSOM has service context for AI impact analysis."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000448</number><order>60</order><remediation_guidance>Enable Service Mapping for key business services. Target your top 10 most critical applications.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Business Service Mapping</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
